proposed_description: Correlative negation: non ... né ... né (Non bevo né caffè né tè), and preverbal Né X né Y dropping non (Né Marco né Luca sono venuti). Also single non ... né ('not ... or'): Non ho fame né sete. Governs the same concord/drop logic as the core.concord leaf but on coordinated elements.

proposed_attributes.canonical_example: Non bevo né caffè né tè.
proposed_attributes.common_miss: Non bevo o caffè o tè (calquing 'either...or'); or keeping non with a preverbal Né...né subject.

rationale: Not in the ratified 11-node tree and not needed to author any of the 8 ratified leaves, so left out of the delivered batch. But né...né is squarely negation (correlative negative conjunction) and A2-B1 core; it was the one obvious hole I hit when scoping. OWNERSHIP FLAG for Architecture: it sits on the seam with a future coordination/connettivi tree (the positive counterpart o...o / e...e would live there). Proposing it under negation so it isn't lost; defer the final home to Architecture. If ratified under negation I'll author it in the next pass (est. 4-5 grammar + 2 translation).
